dkrEat.challenge: Dakar Eat needed to digitize their ordering process. It was 100% phone-based, causing errors and lost customers during peak hours.

website.title: The Website
website.description: A modern and warm showcase site highlighting authentic Senegalese cuisine. Intuitive navigation, interactive menu with online ordering, and responsive design optimized for conversion.

results.title: Results

landing.title: The Landing Page
landing.description: A clean and modern landing page presenting the Nisware concept. Responsive design optimized for desktop, tablet and mobile with direct APK download.

concept.title: The Concept
concept.description: Social networks connect us to the whole world, but none connect us to what's happening around us. Nisware solves this with local, ephemeral content shared by nearby people.

results.title: Features
results.description: Markets & meetups, concerts & events, promos & deals, alerts & incidents, neighborhood life, local tourism — all visible for 24h within a 3km radius.

results.title: Results

dashboard.description: Complete overview of your prospecting: total leads, qualified leads, active campaigns and open rates. Quick actions to launch scraping, manage leads or create a campaign.

scraping.description: Automated lead extraction from Google Maps and Pappers. Configuration by business type, location and result count. Automatic enrichment of collected data.

campaigns.description: Full email campaign management with real-time tracking: recipients, sends, opens, clicks, replies and bounces. Custom template creation.

results.title: Results
results.description: Detailed analytics with score distribution, leads by source and status. A comprehensive analytics dashboard to optimize your prospecting.

No existing online presence to showcase this one-of-a-kind venue.

process.title: 5 steps. Zero improvisation.
process.subtitle: Every step is designed to minimize risk and maximize return on investment.

discovery.title: Strategic Diagnosis
discovery.description: Before we code, we understand. Your market, your competitors, your growth objectives. No superficial brief — a thorough business diagnosis.

design.title: Concept & Design
design.description: Every mockup is validated by conversion principles, not just aesthetics. Beautiful and high-performing.

development.title: Development
development.description: Clean code, cutting-edge technology, obsessive performance. Your site loads fast, ranks well, and scales without friction.

testing.title: Validation & Optimization
testing.description: Rigorous cross-device testing, journey optimization, performance audits. Nothing ships without being flawless.

launch.title: Launch & Acceleration
launch.description: Go-live, training, KPI monitoring. Your site doesn't stop at launch — that's where growth begins.

about.title: Not an agency. A growth partner.
about.description: AgaiGency is named after the person who inspires me every day: my wife. From that inspiration came an obsession — that every euro invested in digital should deliver concrete results. Too many leaders pay a premium for websites that generate nothing. Our mission: build digital tools that produce measurable returns. No empty promises. Verifiable performance.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: The most performant technologies in service of your business goals.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: No compromises. Every detail is engineered for performance and credibility.

results.title: Measurable ROI
results.description: Every project is measured. Every euro invested must deliver returns.

testimonials.title: They trusted us. Here's what happened.
testimonials.subtitle: We don't promise results. We deliver them.

client1.name: Moussa D.
client1.quote: AgaiGency perfectly understood our vision. The website and admin dashboard transformed how we manage the restaurant. Result: +40% online orders in the first month.

client2.name: Kévin & Marvin
client2.quote: Exceptional work. Our website perfectly reflects the premium image we wanted. The booking system works flawlessly and our clients love the experience.

client3.name: Amadou S.
client3.quote: Professionalism, responsiveness, and creativity. The team delivered a landing page and application that exceeded our expectations. I recommend 100%.

client4.name: Ben
client4.quote: AgaiGency built our SaaS platform from scratch: scraping, lead management, email campaigns and analytics. A custom tool that revolutionized our sales prospecting.

faq.title: Before we work together
faq.subtitle: Answers to the questions serious leaders ask before investing.

price.question: How much does a professional website cost?
price.answer: We don't size a cost — we size an investment. Our projects start from $2,000 for a strategic showcase website. For custom business applications, expect $10,000+. Every dollar is justified by a clear performance objective. We establish a detailed investment plan before we begin.

timeline.question: What are the delivery timelines?
timeline.answer: A strategic showcase site: 3 to 5 weeks. A custom application: 6 to 12 weeks. We prioritize quality and performance over speed. A precise timeline with milestones is defined from day one.

maintenance.question: Do you offer maintenance services?
maintenance.answer: A high-performing site today can become obsolete tomorrow. Our maintenance plans guarantee security, performance, and continuous evolution. Your investment is protected over time.

seo.question: Will my site be optimized for SEO?
seo.answer: This isn't optional — it's a prerequisite. Every site we deliver is optimized for search: technical architecture, load times, semantic markup, metadata. We can also manage your SEO strategy long-term for compounding results.

teaser.title: How many clients are you losing each month?
teaser.subtitle: Your site may have invisible leaks. 30 seconds is all it takes to discover what your competitors are already exploiting.

page.title: Free website diagnostic
page.subtitle: Enter your website address — we'll analyze what your visitors and Google really see.

results.title: Your site diagnostic
results.verdictCritical: Your site is working against you. Every day that passes, you're losing clients to better-positioned competitors.
results.verdictWeak: Your site has potential, but significant issues are holding back your growth and visibility.
results.verdictOk: Your site is decent, but several optimizations could significantly increase your inquiries.
results.verdictGood: Your site is well optimized. A few targeted adjustments can still improve your results.
results.keywordsTitle: Clients are searching for you — but can't find you
results.keywordsSubtitle: These searches are made every month by your potential clients. Your competitors show up, you don't.
results.financialDesc: Estimated revenue you're leaving to your competitors every month
results.unlockSubtitle: Discover all the issues holding back your site, with the concrete impact on your business.
results.ctaTitle: You now know the problems. Want the solutions?
results.ctaSubtitle: Book a 30-minute call. We'll present a concrete action plan, tailored to your business and goals.

audit.perf.lcp.findingGood: Your site loads in {value} seconds — your visitors see your content quickly
audit.perf.lcp.findingBad: Your visitors wait {value} seconds before seeing your site
audit.perf.lcp.impact: More than half of visitors leave a site that takes over 3 seconds to load. Every second lost means fewer clients.
audit.perf.cls.findingGood: Your page is stable — nothing jumps around during loading
audit.perf.cls.findingBad: Elements on your page jump and shift during loading
audit.perf.cls.impact: Imagine a visitor trying to tap your contact button, and the button moves at the last second. That's frustrating — and it drives prospects away.
audit.perf.tbt.findingGood: Your site responds immediately to clicks — good responsiveness
audit.perf.tbt.findingBad: Your site takes {value}ms to respond when a visitor clicks
audit.perf.tbt.impact: When a prospect clicks "Get a quote" and nothing happens for several seconds, they think the site is broken and leave.
audit.perf.fcp.findingGood: Your site starts displaying in {value}s — good first impression
audit.perf.fcp.findingBad: Your site shows a blank screen for {value} seconds when opening
audit.perf.fcp.impact: A prolonged blank screen makes your site feel broken. Visitors leave before even seeing your offer.
audit.perf.images.findingGood: Your photos and images are well optimized for the web
audit.perf.images.findingBad: Some images on your site are too heavy and slow down loading
audit.perf.images.impact: Heavy images slow down your entire site. Each second of delay costs you about 7% of your contact requests.
audit.perf.modernFormats.findingGood: Your images use modern, lightweight formats
audit.perf.modernFormats.findingBad: Your images use older formats that are much heavier than necessary
audit.perf.modernFormats.impact: Modern image formats are up to 80% lighter. Your site could load much faster without losing any visual quality.
audit.perf.compression.findingGood: Your site loads quickly thanks to data compression
audit.perf.compression.findingBad: Your site sends raw files without compression — it's slower than it needs to be
audit.perf.compression.impact: Without compression, your pages are up to 5 times heavier. It's like mailing a letter in a box — it arrives, but it's slow and wasteful.
audit.perf.cache.findingGood: Returning visitors find your site loads instantly
audit.perf.cache.findingBad: Returning visitors have to re-download everything each time they visit
audit.perf.cache.impact: A returning client has to wait just as long as the first time. Result: they go somewhere else.
audit.perf.renderBlocking.findingBad: {count} elements are blocking your page from displaying — your visitors see a blank screen
audit.perf.renderBlocking.impact: Your site waits for files to load before showing anything. Meanwhile, your visitors see nothing and grow impatient.
audit.perf.unusedCss.findingBad: Your site loads unused code that slows down the display
audit.perf.unusedCss.impact: Unnecessary code weighs down your pages. It's dead weight that slows the experience for every visitor.
audit.perf.unusedJs.findingBad: Your site loads scripts that serve no purpose on this page
audit.perf.unusedJs.impact: These useless scripts block interactivity. Visitors can't click or navigate until everything is loaded.
audit.seo.title.findingGood: Your Google title is well written: "{content}"
audit.seo.title.findingBad: Your Google title is {length} characters — it gets cut off in search results
audit.seo.title.findingMissing: Your site has no title in Google search results
audit.seo.title.impact: The title is the first thing people see in Google. Without a compelling title, they click on your competitors instead of you.
audit.seo.meta.findingGood: Your Google description is well written
audit.seo.meta.findingBad: Your Google description is {length} characters — it's not optimal
audit.seo.meta.findingMissing: You have no description in Google search results
audit.seo.meta.impact: Without a custom description, Google shows a random snippet from your page. You lose control over the first impression you make.
audit.seo.h1.findingGood: Your page has a clear main heading: "{content}"
audit.seo.h1.findingMissing: Your page has no main heading — Google doesn't understand what it's about
audit.seo.h1.findingMultiple: Your page has {count} main headings instead of one — Google is confused
audit.seo.h1.impact: Google needs a clear main heading to understand your page and show it to the right people. Without it, your site is invisible for the searches that matter.
audit.seo.imagesAlt.findingGood: All your images are properly described for Google
audit.seo.imagesAlt.findingBad: {missing} of your {total} images are invisible to Google
audit.seo.imagesAlt.impact: Google can't "see" your photos. You're missing out on all the traffic from Google Images — an often overlooked source of prospects.
audit.seo.sitemap.findingGood: Google has a complete map of your site to explore
audit.seo.sitemap.findingBad: Google has no map to explore your site
audit.seo.sitemap.impact: Without a site map, Google takes weeks — even months — to discover your new pages. Your competitors, on the other hand, get indexed immediately.
audit.seo.robots.findingGood: You're properly guiding Google through your site
audit.seo.robots.findingBad: You're not guiding Google — it explores your site randomly
audit.seo.robots.impact: Without directions, Google may index useless pages and miss the ones that matter. Your key pages might never show up.
audit.seo.structuredData.findingGood: Your site uses enhanced data to stand out in Google
audit.seo.structuredData.findingBad: Your Google results are basic — no stars, no reviews, no prices
audit.seo.structuredData.impact: Competitors who show stars, prices, or reviews in Google naturally get more clicks than you. It's an easy advantage to take.
audit.seo.og.findingGood: When someone shares your site, the preview looks complete and professional
audit.seo.og.findingBad: When someone shares your site on social media, the preview is empty or poorly formatted
audit.seo.og.impact: A shared link without an image or description looks unprofessional. Every share is a missed click opportunity.
audit.seo.wordCount.findingGood: Your page has {count} words — rich content that Google loves
audit.seo.wordCount.findingBad: Your page has only {count} words — too little to convince Google
audit.seo.wordCount.impact: Google favors pages with rich, detailed content. With so little text, your page has very little chance of showing up in search results.
audit.seo.canonical.findingGood: Google knows exactly which version of your page is the right one
audit.seo.canonical.findingBad: Google might confuse different versions of your page
audit.seo.canonical.impact: If Google indexes multiple versions of the same page, your ranking power is diluted. It's like splitting your votes between candidates — nobody wins.
audit.mobile.viewport.findingGood: Your site adapts correctly to all screen sizes
audit.mobile.viewport.findingBad: Your site doesn't adapt to phone screens
audit.mobile.viewport.impact: 60% of your visitors browse from their phone. If your site isn't adapted, you're losing more than half your potential clients.
audit.mobile.fontSize.findingGood: Text is readable on phone without zooming
audit.mobile.fontSize.findingBad: Your site's text is too small on phone — visitors have to zoom to read
audit.mobile.fontSize.impact: Your visitors won't zoom in to read your prices or phone number. They'll go to a competitor whose site is readable.
audit.mobile.tapTargets.findingGood: Your site's buttons are easy to tap on phone
audit.mobile.tapTargets.findingBad: Your site's buttons and links are too small or too close together on phone
audit.mobile.tapTargets.impact: When visitors try to tap "Book" and hit the wrong button, the frustration makes them leave your site.
audit.mobile.loadTime.findingGood: Your site loads in {value}s on phone — fast
audit.mobile.loadTime.findingBad: Your site takes {value} seconds to load on phone
audit.mobile.loadTime.impact: On mobile networks, your site is slow. Yet it's the mobile version that Google uses to rank you. Slow on mobile = invisible on Google.
audit.security.https.findingGood: Your site is secure — visitors see the padlock icon in their browser
audit.security.https.findingBad: Your site shows "Not Secure" in your visitors' browser
audit.security.https.impact: When a visitor sees "Not Secure," they leave immediately. The abandonment rate is 2x higher on unsecured sites. It's also a Google ranking factor.
audit.security.headers.findingGood: Your site is protected against common attacks
audit.security.headers.findingBad: {missing} security protections are missing from your site
audit.security.headers.impact: Your site is vulnerable to attacks that could harm your visitors. Google takes security into account in its rankings.
audit.security.compression.findingGood: Your site is optimized to load quickly
audit.security.compression.findingBad: Your site sends files without compressing them — it's slower than necessary
audit.security.compression.impact: Without compression, your pages are up to 5 times heavier. It's like mailing a letter in a box — it arrives, but it's slow and wasteful.

footer.description: Digital growth partner for leaders who refuse mediocrity.
